metadata.decryption_algorithm: XOR with rotating 8-byte key from PROD_ID, then XOR with 93

sn8p_strings.T1_0: Art Of War 2: Online&Version: [V]&&Development:&© Gear Games, 2010&&Publishing and porting:&© Herocraft, 2011&&Music:&Bogatenko A.N.&&support@herocraft.com&&wap.herocraft.com&&www.herocraft.com
sn8p_strings.T1_1: Bad server connection, possible disconnect. Please wait
sn8p_strings.T1_10:
You can use a bonus during the battle. Tap the button on the left bottom corner and then choose the third option in the menu. Select a bonus you would like to use in the appeared window. 
Bonuses gives benefits.
sn8p_strings.T1_11: Bonus in use and it's duration is displayed under the radar
sn8p_strings.T1_12: You can use only one bonus at a time
sn8p_strings.T1_13: Some units switch to siege mode automatically when the enemy is near
sn8p_strings.T1_130: The commander controls the army and buildings from here. All buildings must be placed within a certain radius from the command centre. The command centre is also a financial source. Every additional command centre gives you 30% less money than the last.
sn8p_strings.T1_131: Every generator produces and provides several buildings with power. If the building is lacking energy it will stop working
sn8p_strings.T1_132: Train infantry. You can order different types of infantry at the same time. Your order will be done consistently
sn8p_strings.T1_133: Makes machines. You can order different types of machines at the same time. Your order will be done consistently
sn8p_strings.T1_134: Research new technologies here. You can research only one technology at a time
sn8p_strings.T1_135: Defensive building with heavy armour. Armed with a heavy machine gun with enhanced fire rate. Average overview radius and fire range
sn8p_strings.T1_136: Discovers territory with wide overview radius.
sn8p_strings.T1_137: Rocket complex armed with long-distance heavy rockets. High visibility radius
sn8p_strings.T1_138: The commander controls the army and buildings from here. All buildings must be placed within a certain radius from the command centre. The command centre is also a financial source. Every additional command centre gives you 30% less money than the last.
sn8p_strings.T1_139: Every generator produces and provides several buildings with power. If the building is lacking energy it will stop working
sn8p_strings.T1_14: You can also activate siege mode by yourself
sn8p_strings.T1_140: Train infantry. You can order different types of infantry at the same time. Your order will be done consistently
sn8p_strings.T1_141: Makes machines. You can order different types of machines at the same time. Your order will be done consistently
sn8p_strings.T1_142: Research new technologies here. You can research only one technology at a time
sn8p_strings.T1_143: Defensive building with heavy armour. Armed with a heavy machine gun with enhanced fire rate. Average overview radius and fire range
sn8p_strings.T1_144: Has wide visibility radius, because of sniper in the tower
sn8p_strings.T1_145: The barrier. Made for stopping enemy units
sn8p_strings.T1_146: The barrier. Made for stopping enemy units
sn8p_strings.T1_147: A personnel mine. Deals light damage to machinery
sn8p_strings.T1_148: A multi-charged mine. Jumps before detonation. When it detonates, small fragments and some additional charges scatter
sn8p_strings.T1_149: Anti-tank mine. Detonates only when enemy machines are nearby
sn8p_strings.T1_15: There are two types of orders: simple and advanced (see help)
sn8p_strings.T1_150: Armed with an automatic rifle. Light equipment allows fast movement. Effective against infantry
sn8p_strings.T1_151: Armed with a rocket launcher. Effective against light and medium machinery
sn8p_strings.T1_152: Armed with a hand flamer. Very effective against infantry. Heavy equipment reduces movement speed
sn8p_strings.T1_153: Heavy-armoured assault machine. Armed with a heavy machine gun. Has a medium speed, firing range and overview radius
sn8p_strings.T1_154: Light tank with high speed rotating gun. Rotating gun allows to shooting in any direction whilst moving. Has medium firing range and overview radius
sn8p_strings.T1_155: Heavy tank. Has low speed because of armour, but very powerful damage and wide attack range. Upgrade allows you to install rocket launcher onto it
sn8p_strings.T1_156: Multiple rocket launcher system with extra-wide attack range. One rocket salvo covers a large territory but needs a lot of time to recharge. For rocket salvo you need to activate siege mode
sn8p_strings.T1_157: Armed with an automatic rifle. Light equipment allows fast movement. Effective against infantry
sn8p_strings.T1_158: Armed with a rocket launcher. Effective against light and medium machinery
sn8p_strings.T1_159: Armed with a long-range sniper rifle. In siege mode overview and attack radius extends
sn8p_strings.T1_16: Simple order, activates by tapping on a destination point.
sn8p_strings.T1_160: Light assault car with light armour and medium machine gun. Has high speed which makes it perfect for quick attacks and scouting. Overview radius and attack range are small
sn8p_strings.T1_161: Heavy-armoured assault machine. Armed with a heavy machine gun. Has a medium speed, fire range and overview radius
sn8p_strings.T1_162: Medium tank. Has high speed, damage in standard mode is medium. Upgrade allows to switch to the siege mode which increases damage and firing rate.
sn8p_strings.T1_163: Mobile missile system. Armed with heavy machine gun and rocket launcher with super fast reloading system, which allows the firing of rockets in any direction without turning. Has heavy armour and medium speed
sn8p_strings.T1_165:
Health recovery for infantry increases 3 times. 
Requires Energy suit
sn8p_strings.T1_169: Allows you to train Flame Assaults. Flamethrower causes no damage to Confederation units due to fireproof armour
sn8p_strings.T1_17: Forced order can be made with context menu
sn8p_strings.T1_170:
Heavy flamethrower installs on AV-40 'Fortress' 
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_171: Increases damage for Zeus and Hammer tanks by 25%
sn8p_strings.T1_172: Increases speed for all machinery by 1. Allows you to make a 'Zeus' tank
sn8p_strings.T1_173:
Increases armour for all machinery by 2
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_174:
Increases repair speed for all machinery by 3 times
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_175:
Reduces the reload speed for 'Zeus' and 'Hammer' tanks
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_176:
Rotating rocket launcher with heavy missile. Installs on 'Zeus' tank
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_177:
Allows you to produce Torrent-5 MRLS
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_178:
Upgrade Torrent-5 MRLS. Increases missile fire range by 15% and damage by 30%
Requires: Torrent-5 MRLS
sn8p_strings.T1_179: Increases amount of energy produced by 30%
sn8p_strings.T1_18: To open the context menu, hold FIRE anywhere on the map
sn8p_strings.T1_180: Increases armour for all buildings by 50%
sn8p_strings.T1_183: Reduces the infantry training time by 30%
sn8p_strings.T1_184: Reduces the machinery building time by 30%
sn8p_strings.T1_186: Reward for every destroyed enemy unit increases by 50%
sn8p_strings.T1_188: Increases armour for all infantry by 1
sn8p_strings.T1_189: Triples health recovery for all infantry
sn8p_strings.T1_19: Please select your country and your operator ,if necessary. If you select the wrong country the game won't work correctly and you won't be able to participate in battles and join clans
sn8p_strings.T1_192: Grenadier's overview radius and fire range increases by 1
sn8p_strings.T1_194:
Sniper's overview radius and fire range increases by 2,
damage increases by 20%
Requires: Snipers
sn8p_strings.T1_195: Increases damage for coyotes and armadillos by 15%
sn8p_strings.T1_196: Increases speed for all machinery by 1. Allows you to make a 'Rhino' tank
sn8p_strings.T1_197:
Increases armour for all machinery by 1
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_198:
Tripes repair speed for all machinery 
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_199:
Reduces the reload speed for 'Rhino' tank
 Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_2:
CONTROL PHASE. Give orders. If you want to end a turn in advance you can tap the button on the left bottom corner and then 
choose the first option in the menu
sn8p_strings.T1_20: Choose your country?&& Choose the supported operators below. Buying titles and refilling your account won't be able through other operators.&&
sn8p_strings.T1_200:
Allows you to activate the Siege mode for 'Rhino' tank
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_201:
Allows you to produce MMC 'Porcupine'
Requires: Reinforced engine
sn8p_strings.T1_202:
Advanced 'Porcupine'. Doubles firing range and increases damage by 15%
Requires: MMC 'Porcupine'
sn8p_strings.T1_203: Increases amount of energy produced by 30%
sn8p_strings.T1_204: Increases armour for all buildings by 50%
sn8p_strings.T1_205: Jumps and detonates, damaging infantry and machinery within 1 cell
sn8p_strings.T1_206: Heavy mine, detonates only when machinery rides on it
sn8p_strings.T1_207: Reduces the infantry training time by 30%
sn8p_strings.T1_208: Reduces the machinery producing time by 30%
sn8p_strings.T1_210: Reward for every destroyed enemy unit increases by 50%
sn8p_strings.T1_212: Maximum amount of buildings has been reached
sn8p_strings.T1_22: The name length must be at least 6 characters
sn8p_strings.T1_23: The password must be at least 6 characters
sn8p_strings.T1_29: SMS was sent successfully! Your purchase will be activated on the server in a couple of minutes
sn8p_strings.T1_3:
EXECUTION PHASE. Orders in progress. For boost view tap the button on the left bottom corner and then 
choose the first option in the menu
sn8p_strings.T1_30: SMS sending error. Try send SMS with code [T] to [N] not from the game. Price [P]
sn8p_strings.T1_33:
Your rank:
 [R]


Would you like to promote to get some playable advantages?
sn8p_strings.T1_34:
Your rank:
 [R] 


Would you like to promote for [H]< and get some playable advantages?
sn8p_strings.T1_36: You need to allocate all points
sn8p_strings.T1_4: After the Control phase, data sending to server...
sn8p_strings.T1_40: Error connecting to the server. Error number [E]
sn8p_strings.T1_41: SMS sending error from game. Try to send SMS with code [T] without spaces to [N]. Price [P]
sn8p_strings.T1_45: You haven't got these bonuses left
sn8p_strings.T1_46: You can use bonus only in control gap
sn8p_strings.T1_47: Kick this player out of your clan?
sn8p_strings.T1_48: Do you really want to dissolve the clan?
sn8p_strings.T1_5: Timer at the top of the screen displaying time until the end of current phase
sn8p_strings.T1_51: Suggest a draw to an opponent?
sn8p_strings.T1_52: You really want to throw in the towel?
sn8p_strings.T1_53: Time's up! You won on points!
sn8p_strings.T1_54: Time's up! You lost on points!
sn8p_strings.T1_55: You're entering the battle, this section not available
sn8p_strings.T1_56: If pause lasts more than 2 minutes, the connection to the server will be lost and so will the battle
sn8p_strings.T1_58: Attention! You need to choose country once more!
sn8p_strings.T1_59: You can allocate your XP points one more time. Reallocation costs [H]<.
sn8p_strings.T1_6: In Control phase everything freezes, in Execution phase gameplay resumes
sn8p_strings.T1_60: Access to the internet is denied for this application. Check your internet settings
sn8p_strings.T1_61: This section is not available yet
sn8p_strings.T1_62: You can send next the SMS in [T]. Please, wait...
sn8p_strings.T1_63: Send an application for the tournament battle?
sn8p_strings.T1_64: Enter current tournament? You will have to pay an entry fee from your account
sn8p_strings.T1_65: Enter current tournament again? The entry fee will need to be paid again
sn8p_strings.T1_66: Remove your application for this tournament?
sn8p_strings.T1_67: It is forbidden to use bonuses in this tournament
sn8p_strings.T1_68: You've already used the allowable number of bonuses in this battle
sn8p_strings.T1_69: Such expensive bonuses are forbidden in this tournament
sn8p_strings.T1_7: Both players give orders and watch them execute at the same time
sn8p_strings.T1_70: Such long lasting bonuses are forbidden in this tournament
sn8p_strings.T1_71:
Practice battle with a virtual opponent will help you master the controls and get used to the gameplay
Read the help tips during battle. Battle length - 20 minutes. Start?
sn8p_strings.T1_72: For sending false complaints you can be banned. Send complaint?
sn8p_strings.T1_76: Enter e-mail to retrieve your password
sn8p_strings.T1_79: Enter at least 4 characters from players name
sn8p_strings.T1_8: If you finish your turn in advance, you will have to wait for your opponent
sn8p_strings.T1_80: Enter at least 4 characters from clan's name
sn8p_strings.T1_81: Enter your phone number, in format +79261234567
sn8p_strings.T1_9: You can send a message to your enemy during the battle. Tap on the bottom left corner icon and select the second option in menu.
sn8p_strings.T3_10: If you already have an account which doesn't fit in conditions, you should change your account details on your profile page. Go to the profile page?
sn8p_strings.T3_13: Your purchase will be activated on the server in a couple of minutes.
sn8p_strings.T3_15: Your request for purchase is canceled. Please, try again later.
sn8p_strings.T3_16: You request has been sent to the server. Processing may take a few minutes.
sn8p_strings.T3_2: Error.& SMS sending settings not found
sn8p_strings.T3_4: Welcome to the world of Yourcraft.&Become a member of Yourcraft and you'll be able to:&- participate in contests;&- compete with the players across many foreign countries as well as your own;&- find new friends;&- gain various bonuses and prizes;&- have your personal virtual account to buy the games, maps, lives, levels, pictures;&- create your own levels for all the world to try.
sn8p_strings.T3_9: Login can contain only english letters, numbers, symbols ("." or "_" ). Login can not start or end with a dot. Password can contain only english letters, numbers and symbols (".", "_", "@", "#"). Minimum password and login length is 4 characters.
